info.title: Ailisher Mobile App API Documentation
info.description: Unified interactive API documentation compiled automatically from the Postman app developer collections.

post.description: Registers a new user email and password. This creates a pending user record and sends a 6-digit OTP to the email inbox.
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 1. 4-Step Registration Flow

post.description: Verifies the email OTP. On success, returns 'temp_token' which must be stored in variables to authorize subsequent onboarding requests.
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 1. 4-Step Registration Flow

post.description: Sends a verification OTP to the user's mobile number via WhatsApp. Requires temp_token from Step 2.
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 1. 4-Step Registration Flow

post.summary: Step 3b: Verify Mobile OTP & Link (Auth required)
post.description: Verifies the WhatsApp OTP and links the mobile number to the onboarding session.
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 1. 4-Step Registration Flow

post.description: Submits profile details and completes onboarding. On success, returns the final JWT token to unlock full API access.
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 1. 4-Step Registration Flow

post.description: Logs in the user using email and password.
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 2. User Login Flow

post.description: Requests a login OTP sent to the user's mobile number via WhatsApp.
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 2. User Login Flow

post.description: Verifies the WhatsApp login OTP. On success, logs in the user and returns the active JWT token.
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 2. User Login Flow

post.description: Checks if a user exists with the given email or mobile number for the client.
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 3. Testing Utilities

post.description: Deletes the user and their associated profile/credits (used for re-testing onboarding flows).
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 3. Testing Utilities

post.description: Sends a password reset link to the registered email.
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 4. Forgot & Reset Password Flow

post.description: Resets user password using the token received in the email reset link.
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 4. Forgot & Reset Password Flow

post.description: Sends a 6-digit password reset OTP to the registered email (requires USE_BREVO=true).
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 4. Forgot & Reset Password Flow

post.description: Resets user password using the OTP received via email.
tags: 1. Mobile Authentication Collection | 4. Forgot & Reset Password Flow

get.description: Fetches all active banners for the client, grouped by placement ('top', 'medium', 'bottom') and sorted by their priority order. Image URLs are dynamically signed using Cloudflare R2 presigned URLs.
tags: 2. Mobile Banners Collection | Banners Management

get.description: Fetches the list of synced classroom exams for the client along with their individual lock and paid statuses.
tags: 3. AI Classroom Exams Collection | Classroom Structure

get.description: Fetches exam details. On evaluation, returns 'isLocked: true' along with 'planDetails' recommended list if user has not purchased it yet.
tags: 6. Plans & Paytm Locking Collection | 2. Classroom Access & Locking Status

get.summary: 3. Get Papers List in an Exam
get.description: Fetches the list of all papers registered under a specific exam.
tags: 3. AI Classroom Exams Collection | Classroom Structure

get.description: Fetches all subjects registered under a specific paper with their respective lock and subscription plan details.
tags: 3. AI Classroom Exams Collection | Classroom Structure

get.description: Fetches all chapters and their nested sub-topic metadata registered inside a specific subject. Requires access rights verification.
tags: 3. AI Classroom Exams Collection | Classroom Structure

get.description: Fetches all topics and nested sub-topic references inside a chapter. Requires active subscription validation.
tags: 3. AI Classroom Exams Collection | Classroom Structure

get.description: Fetches all subtopics categorized under a specific topic.
tags: 3. AI Classroom Exams Collection | Classroom Structure

get.description: Retrieves comprehensive data for a single subtopic, including description summaries, active files, and reel logs.
tags: 3. AI Classroom Exams Collection | Classroom Structure

post.description: Submits a question to search and chat with the uploaded PDF paper contents.
tags: 3. AI Classroom Exams Collection | AI Operations (Exams/Papers)

question.example: What is the weightage of physics chapter 1?

get.description: Fetches the chat history log for user's interactions with a specific paper context.
tags: 3. AI Classroom Exams Collection | AI Operations (Exams/Papers)

get.description: Generates and triggers PDF download buffer for the selected subtopic's study notes.
tags: 3. AI Classroom Exams Collection | AI Generation & Learning Tools

get.description: Returns all explanatory reels produced for this subtopic.
tags: 7. AI Classroom Generation & TTS Voice Collection | 1. Topic & Subtopic AI Generation

post.description: Generates narration data and audio endpoints from text context.
tags: 7. AI Classroom Generation & TTS Voice Collection | 2. Text-to-Speech (TTS) Voice APIs

text.example: Welcome to the AI classroom. Today we will cover the French Revolution.

get.description: Dynamically streams binary chunks of synthesized speech audio generated from query parameter string.
tags: 7. AI Classroom Generation & TTS Voice Collection | 2. Text-to-Speech (TTS) Voice APIs

get.description: Retrieves all synced and stored PYQ sets for the registered client.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 1. AI PYQ Sets (Mobile Classroom)

get.description: Retrieves the full list of extracted questions (objective/subjective) parsed from the uploaded PDF.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 1. AI PYQ Sets (Mobile Classroom)

post.description: Engage in an AI chat session utilizing the vectorized context of the custom PYQ Set.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 1. AI PYQ Sets (Mobile Classroom)

question.example: What were the key topics queried in the 2025 BPSC history exam?

get.description: Fetches the full conversation log history with the AI assistant for this specific PYQ Set.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 1. AI PYQ Sets (Mobile Classroom)

get.description: Loads explanation video reels associated with the PYQ Set.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 1. AI PYQ Sets (Mobile Classroom)

get.description: Fetches all PYQ assets bound directly to a target Book, Chapter, Topic, or Subtopic.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 2. General PYQ Assets (Universal CRUD)

parameters.name: isWorkbook
parameters.description: Set to true if querying a workbook item, false for standard books

post.description: Creates and links a new PYQ asset under the specified parent item.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 2. General PYQ Assets (Universal CRUD)

question.example: Which of the following events took place first?

answer.example: Option A explanation and correct answer details

put.description: Updates fields of an existing PYQ asset. User must be the owner (creator) or hold an admin role.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 2. General PYQ Assets (Universal CRUD)

question.example: Which of the following events took place first? (Updated)

delete.description: Deletes the PYQ asset from the database. Requires ownership or admin authorization.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 2. General PYQ Assets (Universal CRUD)

get.description: Search universally across all PYQ assets using text query and specific metadata filters.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 2. General PYQ Assets (Universal CRUD)

get.description: Fetches matching PYQ statistics (difficulty totals, years count) for a specific item.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 2. General PYQ Assets (Universal CRUD)

post.description: Adds a PYQ directly to the book's assets document subdocument array.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 3. Legacy Book-Specific PYQs (Subdocuments)

question.example: Sample legacy question from BPSC exam

delete.description: Removes a PYQ from the book's assets document subdocument array by its subdocument ID.
tags: 4. Previous Year Questions (PYQs) Collection | 3. Legacy Book-Specific PYQs (Subdocuments)

get.description: Fetches current affairs topics from local synced database, merged dynamically with live video reel counts.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 1. AI Current Affairs Topics (Mobile Classroom)

get.description: Retrieves the list of dynamic video reels generated for this specific Current Affairs topic.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 1. AI Current Affairs Topics (Mobile Classroom)

get.description: Fetches list of all reels published by the client, marking each object with 'isLiked' and 'isViewed' flags evaluated specifically for the authenticated student user.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 2. Mobile Video Reels Feed (Student)

get.description: Retrieves the subset of reels marked as 'isPopular = true' and 'isEnabled = true' under the client.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 2. Mobile Video Reels Feed (Student)

post.description: Toggles the user's like on a reel. If delta: 1 is provided, it attempts to increment. If no body parameters are provided, it operates as a standard toggle.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 2. Mobile Video Reels Feed (Student)

post.description: Increments the view counter of the reel. The endpoint only records one view per user ID (using the viewedBy array for tracking).
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 2. Mobile Video Reels Feed (Student)

post.description: Increments the share count in the reel's metrics.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 2. Mobile Video Reels Feed (Student)

post.description: Adds a new comment text to the reel's internal comments list and updates comment metrics.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 2. Mobile Video Reels Feed (Student)

text.example: Excellent analysis of budget tax policies!

get.description: Retrieves the list of comments posted on the reel along with their author ID and timestamp.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 2. Mobile Video Reels Feed (Student)

post.description: Generates a secure presigned URL in Cloudflare R2 bucket. Mobile client must upload binary payload using PUT method directly to the returned 'uploadUrl'.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 3. Reels Feed Administration

post.description: Creates a new Reel. Admin must either provide the uploaded R2 'videoKey' or a valid 'youtubeLink'.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 3. Reels Feed Administration

description.example: A detailed analysis of sector budgets and tax alterations.

get.description: Admin list of all reels created by the business client account. Automatically generates refreshed GET presigned URLs for R2 storage.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 3. Reels Feed Administration

get.description: Fetches all detailed properties of a specific reel.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 3. Reels Feed Administration

put.description: Updates details or metrics of a specific reel. If a new videoKey is passed, the old file is deleted from S3/R2.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 3. Reels Feed Administration

patch.description: Toggles the availability of the reel for end-users on the mobile client feed.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 3. Reels Feed Administration

delete.description: Removes the reel from the database permanently.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 3. Reels Feed Administration

patch.description: Flags or unflags the reel as popular. Popular reels are shown in a designated tab in the feed.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 3. Reels Feed Administration

patch.description: Performs bulk reordering by reassigning contiguous order integers (1, 2, 3...) to the array of reels.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 3. Reels Feed Administration

patch.description: Shifts a single reel to a target order index, shifting others to maintain a contiguous order chain.
tags: 5. Current Affairs & Video Reels Collection | 3. Reels Feed Administration

get.description: Fetches active credit recharge plans that bundle specific courses or exams.

get.summary: Get Plans Without Bundled Items (Credits Only)

get.description: Fetches detailed information for a single plan by its ID.

get.description: Gets the current credit balance and linked purchased plan IDs for the logged-in mobile user.

get.description: Fetches a history of all credit transactions (earned/spent) for the logged-in user.

post.description: Initiate credit recharge payment gateway. Generates Paytm order ID, checksum, parameters, and redirects URL.

post.description: Webhook handler callback triggered by Paytm's servers to complete transaction, update status, and add credits.

get.description: Checks the current status of payment in the local database using the Order ID.

post.description: Calls Paytm's API directly from the backend to verify actual payment status for a specific Order ID.

get.description: Returns status, config environment, and timestamp of the Paytm module backend.
tags: 6. Plans & Paytm Locking Collection | 3. Direct Credits Paytm Purchase

get.description: Fetch all logged payment transactions on the backend (Admin use only).
tags: 6. Plans & Paytm Locking Collection | 3. Direct Credits Paytm Purchase

get.description: Gets counts and total successful amount of transactions grouped by status for a project ID.
tags: 6. Plans & Paytm Locking Collection | 3. Direct Credits Paytm Purchase

get.description: Fetches log of all credit account balance increases and deductions (Admin use only).
tags: 6. Plans & Paytm Locking Collection | 3. Direct Credits Paytm Purchase

post.description: Initiates purchase of items (workbooks) present in the cart, generates a checkout order, and returns Paytm checksum/parameters.

post.description: Paytm callback webhook for cart checkout. Processes order completion, sets workbooks active, and clears cart.
